content.en:
The power of the Extreme Gold List is relatively mild, and it is not so violent and lethal.

However, if the strength is not good, it will not be able to compete with the power of the Extreme Gold List, so it will not be able to enter the inside of the Extreme Gold List.

The average half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm cannot enter the Extreme Creation Gold List, and a very powerful half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm is required.

Ye Tian walked towards the Extreme Gold List step by step, urging the strength of his whole body to compete with the Extreme Gold List.

Time passed slowly, and soon he came to the Extreme Gold List, but at this time, he obviously felt the suppression that was close to the limit, as if it was extremely difficult to take a single step.

"With my strength, if I don't use the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword, I would be a little reluctant to enter the Extreme Gold List. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he can use the secret technique of temporary burst strength to forcibly cross the last bit of distance, or he can directly use the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword, or he can easily enter the Extreme Gold List.

"Let's use the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword Technique, it's already been exposed anyway. "

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body was filled with the power of the rudimentary form of the Sword Pole Dao, and under this force, he directly suppressed the power of the Extreme Gold List, and suddenly Ye Tian touched the Extreme Gold List and stepped into the inside of the Extreme Gold List.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's name appeared on the Extreme Gold List, and this name will be permanently engraved on it, even if Ye Tian doesn't make any progress at all, he will be ranked last and will not disappear.

......

Inside the Extreme Gold List, this place is a world of its own.

At this time, there were already more than a dozen half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm here, and each of them was very powerful.

After Ye Tian entered here at this moment, a batch of resources appeared beside him.

This is the first batch of grants for the Pole Creation Gold List, which includes some pole-making substances.

"The Lord of the Extreme Creation is really rich, how many years have passed, and now he can still give so many Extreme Creation Materials!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

But it's normal to think about it carefully, no one knew the value of the Extreme Creation Substance at the beginning, so the Lord of the Creation Extreme was crazy about collecting, and no one knew how much Extreme Creation Material he had collected.

Of course, there will definitely not be too many pole-making materials in the Pole-making Gold Mountain, and maybe one day the pole-making materials here will be exhausted.

Therefore, Ye Tian naturally wanted to seize the opportunity to get as many rewards as possible this time.

"Start cultivating and strive to quickly break the fifth Extreme Creation Substance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he began to absorb the Extreme Creation Substance, and combined it with the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword to impact the fifth Extreme Creation Chain.

With the assistance of the rudimentary power of the Sword Extreme Dao, Ye Tian's difficulty in breaking the fifth Extreme Chaining was reduced many times.

In addition, Ye Tian still has these pole-making substances, so it will naturally not take long to break the fifth pole-making chain.

With the passage of time, with the continuous consumption of many resources and pole-making materials, Ye Tian's strength continued to improve.

Moreover, Ye Tian was still comprehending the Extreme Dao of the Sword, so the prototype of the Extreme Dao of the Sword was also growing and improving.

After a long time, Ye Tian finally broke the shackles in one fell swoop after consuming a lot of pole-making substances, and broke the fifth pole-making chain.

Suddenly, Ye Tian's strength improved again.

In addition, Ye Tian's Sword Extreme Dao Prototype has also improved very quickly, and the speed of sword path change and fusion has exceeded before, obviously after the Sword Extreme Dao Prototype, it is a new world.

Before you know it, seventy or eighty thousand eternal years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already broken the sixth Pole Creation Chain, and the Sword Dao changes had been fused to six million kinds, which directly caused the power of the Sword Extreme Dao Prototype to skyrocket.

this day.

The Pole Gold List has also given a batch of resources, including some pole-making materials.

"Now that the power of my Sword Extreme Dao Prototype has skyrocketed, although there are not many of these Extreme Creation Materials, there may still be hope that I will break the seventh Extreme Creation Chain!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he began to use these pole-making substances to impact the seventh pole-making chain.

Rumble!

The power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword penetrates into the root of the Body of Control, assisting the Pole-Forming Substance to break the seventh Pole-Forming Chain.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian gradually felt that the seventh pole chain was becoming more and more relaxed, and there were signs of cracking.

Finally, after a long time, that is, when the pole-making material was exhausted, he luckily broke the seventh chain of pole-making.

At this point, Ye Tian's strength has increased a lot again.

"Whew, luck is really good, I was lucky enough to break the seventh chain of pole making. From entering the gold list to the present, a total of three chains have been broken, and this progress is too fast!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, his ability to have such a speed of progress naturally had a huge relationship with the prototype of the Sword Pole Dao, otherwise it would be good to break a chain of Pole Creation just by those Pole Creation Materials given by the Pole Creation Gold List.

Afterwards, Ye Tian took a look at the list of half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm on the Extreme Gold List, and found that his name had already entered the top 100 of the Extreme Creation Gold List, and the ranking was still relatively high.

Eighteenth on the gold list!

"I didn't expect the ranking to be so high!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

However, if you think about it carefully, it is also right, although some half-step perfection controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm have different identities, bring a lot of resources or polarization materials in, and deliberately impact the ranking of the Extreme Creation Gold List, but the half-step perfection controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm who are qualified to enter the Extreme Creation Gold List are very strong in themselves, and it is very difficult to continue to improve their strength.

As a result, they have limited room for improvement.

At this time, there were only ten thousand eternal years left before Ye Tian left the Extreme Gold List.

Ye Tian knew that he would definitely not be able to get the first place in the Extreme Gold List, but he was also very satisfied.

Time passed, and before I knew it, another 10,000 eternal years had passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was excluded from the Extreme Gold List, and his ranking was also fixed.

No. 10 on the Gold List!

"It's good to be in the top 10 of the gold list!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

And soon, this list was known by the major forces.

No Road Tower.

The Lord of Time and other high-level officials were discussing Ye Tian's affairs.

"I just got the news that Ye Tian broke into the tenth place on the Extreme Gold List!"

"What, the tenth place on the Extreme Gold List? How is this possible, those half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm who can enter the top ten of the Extreme Gold List, which one doesn't have a special background, I remember that the Lord of Time, you are only ranked eighty-eighth on the Extreme Gold List!"

"Ahem, the ranking of the Extreme Gold List doesn't mean anything, some half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm know that the Extreme Creation Gold Mountain is about to open, and deliberately prepare a lot of Extreme Creation Materials, as well as leave countless precious treasures not to refine, just wait for them to enter the Extreme Creation Gold List before refining. There are also some super-level perfection controllers who even surpass the existence of super-perfect masters who are specifically to help, so many half-step perfection masters of the Extreme Creation Realm are too high in rank and meaningless. "

"But Ye Tian's identity is average, and we didn't help, and he was able to reach the top ten of the Extreme Gold List, which was very unexpected to us. "

"According to the intelligence, Ye Tian has mastered the Extreme Dao of the Sword Extreme Dao, and may even have mastered the prototype of the Extreme Dao of the Sword. "

"Our Wudao Pagoda doesn't have a perfect treasure involving the Extreme Dao of the Sword, how did Ye Tian comprehend the fur of the Extreme Dao of the Sword? If he wants to comprehend it by himself, it will be too difficult!"

"Maybe there are other chances, in short, what chances he has also belong to him. "

"Hahaha, how can we snatch the opportunity from a junior!"

"Ye Tian's talent is very high, and his potential is very high, do you want to focus on cultivating it?

"Give him the opportunity to comprehend the Perfect Treasure, even those high-level Perfection Masters are extremely eager to give it?"

"I think we can give some years of enlightenment, after all, with his current strength, it is enough to be comparable to Yueli, and we also gave Yueli three million eternal years at the beginning, and it is not too much to give Ye Tian enlightenment. "

In the end, after discussion, these high-level leaders decided to wait for Ye Tian to come back, and let Ye Tian comprehend the three million eternal years in the perfect treasure.
